title: The historical trap Putin can't escape - Sarah Paine
summary: This YouTube video features an interview between host Dwarkesh Patel and Sarah Paine discussing historical patterns in Russian geopolitical strategy. The title suggests analysis of structural constraints Putin faces based on historical precedent.
